gaps.description: src/runtime/ directory is entirely missing — llm.js, stt.js, tts.js, sense.js, memory.js not implemented
src/server/ directory is entirely missing — hub.js, brain.js, api.js not implemented; no HTTP/WebSocket server exists
REST API endpoints (POST /api/chat, POST /api/transcribe, POST /api/synthesize, GET /api/status, GET /api/config, PUT /api/config) not implemented
src/ui/admin/ directory missing — admin panel page (/admin) not implemented
detector/optimizer.js implements Ollama setup/model-pull logic but architecture specifies it should be a hardware optimizer; function is misnamed relative to design intent
detector/matcher.js is an extra file not listed in architecture directory structure (architecture only lists hardware.js, profiles.js, optimizer.js)
detector/gpu-detector.js is an extra file not listed in architecture directory structure
profiles/default.json built-in default config file presence is unverified
install/ directory (setup.sh, Dockerfile, docker-compose.yml) not verified as present
detector/hardware.js detect() matches architecture interface exactly
detector/profiles.js getProfile(hardware) with remote fetch + local cache matches architecture design
src/ui/client/ Vue 3 + Vite chat UI present
